prompt:
Chuyển X post này thành bài Facebook:

X post từ @santifer (Santiago): "Just open-sourced my AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. Career-Ops automates the entire pipeline: scrapes 700+ listings, matches your profile, generates tailored resumes & cover letters. Already evaluated 740 opportunities and created 100+ custom applications. GitHub link: github.com/santifer/career-ops"

Source URL: https://github.com/santifer/career-ops
assertions: Output contains NO URLs in the Facebook post body text
Output contains NO emoji or special Unicode characters (no ✅❌🔴→•1️⃣ etc.)
Output uses Vietnamese language with proper diacritics
Output does NOT mention code architecture, programming languages, or technical implementation details
Output focuses on user benefits: time saved, manual work replaced, or business outcomes
Output uses first-person 'mình' voice, NOT news-reporting style
Output includes a CTA directing readers to comments for links
Output is between 300-600 words per post
Hook (first 2 lines) creates curiosity gap or shock — does not start with 'Hôm nay mình chia sẻ'
